title: antilla alainii
intro: Antilla alainii is a species of sea snail, not a plant, and is actually a type of marine gastropod mollusk. However, considering the request and focusing on the plant part of it if any, it seems like this query was based on a confusion with Antillia alainii (if that's what was meant) - I can't reply to that as there is no information found on any plant species by that name.
